title: GPT-5.5 Pro Repass Rankings
generated_from: GPT-5.5 Pro pasted scenario batches B1-B61 with clean-risk, accounting, cash/debt, country, semiconductor, per-name momentum ratings, and placement blurbs
scoring_note: Clean-risk rerank updated May 21, 2026 after batches B55-B59: base/bull MOIC is considered, but default order is driven by adjusted clean_score. Accounting, audit, filing-delay, disclosure, going-concern, debt/refinancing, and dilution flags are penalized. Net-cash, high-cash, debt-free, tangible-book, cash-flow, dividend, buyback, backlog, NAV/book support, and low-leverage balance-sheet support receive modest positive offsets.
